name: Sauteed Fiddleheads with Pancetta
recipeIngredient: 4 cups fiddleheads, trimmed and cleaned,  see note
1/2 pound pancetta, cut into 1/4 inch dice
kosher salt and freshly ground pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pot of lightly salted water to a boil.
2. Add the fiddleheads and blanch for 5 minutes.
3. Drain the fiddleheads well.
4. Place the pancetta in a large skillet over medium heat and fry until browned.
5. Add the drained fiddleheads to the skillet and sauté for 2 minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Divide the mixture among 4 plates and serve immediately.
